name: autotask-mcp
description: Autotask PSA MCP server with opinkerfi workflow tools

installation.notes: Set environment variables via: claude mcp add autotask-mcp -e AUTOTASK_USERNAME=... -e AUTOTASK_SECRET=... -e AUTOTASK_INTEGRATION_CODE=...

documentation.setup: See mcp/autotask.md in opinkerfi/ai marketplace for environment variables and configuration
